title: TBI-ADRD Mouse Husbandry
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"yhgd1","text":"This document describes the housing conditions and husbandry protocol for TBI-ADRD mice. These conditions are standardized to promote reproducibility and are associated with conditions used in the following protocol: \"TBI ADRD Closed Head Injury (CHI) Standard Operating Procedure\". dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.14egnrqw6l5d/v1","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"rn6nx","text":"Photoperiod:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"enifv","text":"12 hours light, 12 hours dark","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mgn0w","text":"Light cycle is either between 6 am and 6 pm or 7 am and 7 pm","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"supyy","text":" Irradiated Andersons Enrich-o’Cobs – Product Code 4EB (1/4” cob + paper rolls) (URL: https://assets.andersonsplantnutrient.com/pdf/The-Andersons_Enrich-oCobBrochure_web.pdf)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ka2sg","text":"Bio-Huts from Bio-Serv #K3352 (URL: https://www.bio-serv.com/product/Bio_Huts.html)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b5ud5","text":"SAFE Blocks Small (mouse, Aspen wood) Safe-Lab (URL: https://safe-lab.com/safe_en/products/enrichment.php)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pjyjf","text":"Diet 5K52 - LabDiet® JL Rat and Mouse/Auto 6F (URL: https://www.labdiet.com/product/detail/5k52-labdiet-jl-rat-and-mouse-auto-6f)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kyomh","text":"Water: Reverse Osmosis processed, pH 6.8-7","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: The scope of this SOP includes: Husbandry protocol (Housing, Social Needs, Enrichment, Diet, Water)

SOP Author: responsible for production of the SOP and its described procedures SOP Owner: responsible for reviewing and approving changes to the SOP Lab staff and students: responsible for following the procedure NO CHANGES to this SOP are authorized without the explicit approval from the SOP owner

Mice are group housed, up to 5 per cage, in ventilated shoebox cages with 75 in 2 floor area and 5.5” height. Cage change is weekly where new food, nesting, and enrichment materials are provided. Temperature: 22.2 ± 8°C Relative humidity: 20-80% Bedding and Nesting: Irradiated Andersons Enrich-o’Cobs – Product Code 4EB (1/4” cob + paper rolls) (URL: https://assets.andersonsplantnutrient.com/pdf/The-Andersons_Enrich-oCobBrochure_web.pdf) Enrichment: Bio-Huts from Bio-Serv #K3352 (URL: https://www.bio-serv.com/product/Bio_Huts.html) SAFE Blocks Small (mouse, Aspen wood) Safe-Lab (URL: https://safe-lab.com/safe_en/products/enrichment.php) Photoperiod: 12 hours light, 12 hours dark Light cycle is either between 6 am and 6 pm or 7 am and 7 pm
Diet 5K52 - LabDiet® JL Rat and Mouse/Auto 6F (URL: https://www.labdiet.com/product/detail/5k52-labdiet-jl-rat-and-mouse-auto-6f) Water: Reverse Osmosis processed, pH 6.8-7
creator: gustavo.gomez
